title: Watsco Completes Acquisition of Jackson Supply Company
author: Na
description: Watsco (NYSE:WSO) has completed its acquisition of Jackson Supply Company, a major independent HVAC distributor with $230 million in 2025 sales. Jackson Supply will maintain its name, leadership, and brand identity while joining Watsco's portfolio. The acquisition adds 25 locations and approximately 5,000 contractor customers across the Sunbelt region, strengthening Watsco's position in the estimated $74 billion North American HVAC/R distribution market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The successful completion of the Jackson Supply acquisition represents strategic growth expansion, adding $230 million in sales, 25 locations, and 5,000 contractor customers across high-growth Sunbelt markets. The deal strengthens Watsco's position as the largest distributor in the fragmented North American HVAC/R market and demonstrates management's commitment to growth and market consolidation.

title: Watsco Declares $3.30 Quarterly Dividend
author: Na
description: Watsco, Inc. (NYSE:WSO) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $3.30 per share, representing a 10% increase to an annual rate of $13.20. The company has paid dividends for 52 consecutive years and attributes the increase to its strong financial position, solid balance sheet, and confidence in its business. Watsco is investing in AI-driven initiatives and digital platforms to enhance customer experience and capture market share in the HVAC/R distribution industry.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a 10% dividend increase, demonstrating confidence in its business fundamentals and strong financial position. The 52-year consecutive dividend payment history and investments in growth initiatives (AI-driven solutions, digital platforms) with approximately 73,000 engaged contractors indicate solid operational performance and future growth prospects.

title: Watsco Boosts Annual Dividend 10% to $13.20 Per Share
author: Globe Newswire
description: Watsco Inc. announced a 10% increase in its annual dividend to $13.20 per share, effective with the April 2026 quarterly payment. The increase reflects the company's confidence in its business prospects, supported by strong cash flow and balance sheet. Watsco has maintained consecutive dividend payments for 52 years and remains the largest HVAC/R distributor in North America.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced a 10% dividend increase to $13.20 per share, demonstrating confidence in business prospects and strong financial health. The 52-year consecutive dividend payment history and management's emphasis on robust cash flow and conservative balance sheet further support positive sentiment. The company's market leadership in HVAC/R distribution and AI-driven growth initiatives add to the positive outlook.

The company announced a 10% dividend increase to $13.20 per share, demonstrating confidence in business prospects and strong financial health. title: Watsco Reports Record Full-Year Gross Margin, Meets Inventory Reduction Target and Generates Record 4th Quarter Cash Flow in Challenging Market Conditions
author: Globe Newswire
description: Watsco, the largest North American HVAC distributor, reported record full-year gross margin of 28.0% and record Q4 operating cash flow of $400 million despite a 5% revenue decline to $7.24 billion. The company successfully reduced inventory by 30% to $1.4 billion after the A2L refrigerant transition and increased its annual dividend by 10% to $13.20 per share. With $780 million in cash and no debt, Watsco is positioned for growth through technology investments and its fragmented market opportunity.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite challenging market conditions and a 5% revenue decline, Watsco achieved record gross margins (28.0%, +120 bps), record Q4 cash flow ($400 million), successfully executed a major inventory reduction (30% decline), and increased dividends by 10%. The company maintains a strong balance sheet with $780 million in cash and no debt, positioning it well for future growth. Strong execution on technology investments and market share gains in a fragmented industry support positive outlook.

title: Watsco Schedules Conference Call to Review 2025 Fourth Quarter Performance and Annual Results
author: Na
description: Watsco, Inc. announced it will hold a conference call on February 17, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss its 2025 fourth quarter performance and annual results. The earnings will be released before market open, with prepared remarks followed by a Q&A session with senior management. The company also declared a $3.00 quarterly dividend.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is maintaining regular dividend payments ($3.00 quarterly) and demonstrating confidence in its financial position by scheduling earnings announcements. The article highlights Watsco's market leadership position as the largest North American HVAC/R distributor with strong historical performance (17% compounded annual total-shareholder return) and ongoing investments in AI-driven initiatives and digital platforms to drive future growth.
